title: ジャパンCの後に・Das Wachstum

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash prevails over her senior-year
competitors. It was a heated battle, but there's no
denying she has taken a big step forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She will likely face the two experienced racers
again at the Arima Kinen, but Eishin Flash is
confident all she has to do is win again.
